A reflection has been released.

You are now following this presence.
You have stopped following this presence.
This reflection will stay with you.
The reflection has been set free from your journey.
Your reflections are ready for their journey.
The journey was interrupted. Please try again.
This reflection hasn\'t found its voice yet.
Your presence needs to be reaffirmed.
The ritual could not be completed at this time.
This name is already in use by another presence.
The connection has faded. Let it rest and try again.
Your access to this reflection is clouded.
Your presence is unknown. Please reveal yourself.
The departure was delayed. Please try again.
Your presence has been dissolved from this space.
Something unexpected happened. Let\'s try again in a moment.
